calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Nancy Dolch appearing for and with Debra Dolch, administrator. Robert Simon appearing for Judith Bacciocco. Gerome Garchik appearing for Ellina Teper as guardian ad litem for Athena. D T Rogers appearing for Ellina Teper as guardian for Athena. Disputed issues addressed. Court wants parties to discuss the issues outside of court. At 9:56am, all parties return to court with an agreement on the issues. Counsel will submit a new order. Matter submitted. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

Rogers appearing for Ellina Teper, guardian for Athena in San Mateo County. Parties have agreed on distribution on incomes. Matter is continued to 5/9. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
